description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rich orange hue and a short, sturdy brown stem on top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing expression, featuring sharp, angular eyes, a furrowed brow, and a jagged mouth with pointed teeth, giving it a classic Halloween jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carving is deep enough to reveal the hollow interior, and the cut edges are slightly rough, indicating it was hand-carved. The pumpkin sits on a flat, light-colored surface, possibly a piece of cardboard or wood, which contrasts with its vibrant color. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, smooth, and show natural ribbing typical of pumpkins. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional embellishments attached to the pumpkin.
description: A hand-carved orange pumpkin with a fierce jack-o'-lantern face and a short brown stem, sitting on a flat surface. The front is intricately cut, while the back and sides remain smooth and uncarved.
description_view_0: The front view displays the carved face with sharp eyes, a furrowed brow, and a jagged mouth with pointed teeth, as well as the visible stem.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the smooth, uncarved surface of the pumpkin and the stem, with the carved opening partially visible on the right edge.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the completely uncarved, rounded back of the pumpkin and the stem, with no facial features or openings visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the smooth, uncarved surface and the stem, with a partial glimpse of the carved opening on the left edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: The carving pattern is a traditional jack-o'-lantern face with sharp, angular eyes, a furrowed brow, and a jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The style is expressive and menacing, with deep cutouts for the facial features and rough, hand-carved edges.
attribute_placement_location: on a flat board or piece of cardboard
